title: Gorffy Wood Screws, 360 PCS Color Zinc Countersunk Self Tapping Screws Assortment for DIY, Furniture & Repairs, Black
features: 【Mixed Screws】-These wood screws assortment with 9 types of countersunk head screws. 60pcs M3*16mm, 60 pcs M3*20mm，30 pcs M3*30mm, 50 pcs M3.5*16mm, 50 pcs M3.5*20mm, 30 pcs M3.5*25mm, 30 pcs M4*20mm, 30 pcs M4*30mm and 20 pcs M4*40mm, a total of 360pcs self tapping screws.

【Premium Material】-Our wood screws are made of high quality color zinc, which is durable, strong, high strength and non-deformation. . Colorized zinc screws have corrosion resistance and can be retained for a long time. They are premium self-tapping screws that can retain shine with metallic lustre for a long time.

【How to Use】-Use a Phillips screwdriver bit to insert the screw and place it in the fixed position, then tighten it clockwise. The screwdriver automatically stops when your wood screw reaches the right torque. These assorted wood screws are ideal for the progressive building and DIY trade. Self tapping screws can be used to secure sheet metal, PVC panels, plastic or wood.

【Easy to Store】-The screws assortment with a plastic box, which has enough space to accommodate all the wood screws. These grub screws assorted can be placed in different lattices according to their sizes, very convenient for you to choose suitable sizes, easy to carry and use anytime and anywhere.

【Wide Applications】-Our wood screws are designed to have a good surface finish with smooth edges. This prevents sharp, rough edges from hurting your hands when using them. Self tapping screws are designed for wood (such as hardwood, plywood, particleboard, fiberboard), metal, plastic and board articles, etc. Wood screws assortment generally used in furniture products, house decoration, wall panels, decks, and equipment industries, etc.
description: Product Description Wood Screws, 360 Pcs Wood Screws Assortment, Multi Use High Performance Self Tapping Screws, Assorted Wood Screws For DIY, Furniture & Repairs Gorffy Produces Quality Wood Screws Wood screws assortment used in furniture products, house decoration, wall panels, decks, and equipment industries, etc. 360PCS Self Tapping Wood Screw Kits Specification : M3 M3.5 M4 Drive Style : Phillips Material: Color Zinc Screws assortment thickened material, strong and durable, no rust, corrosion resistance. These assorted wood screws are stored in a plastic box for ease and efficiency. The thread of the self tapping screw extends from the bottom of the screw head to the screw head for maximum holding force. Standard Phillips Slot Excellent craftsmanship makes our cross groove not slippery, not easy to break, not easy to deform, not eccentric. Deep and clear threads Screws can be easily and accurately threaded through the wood and are not easily deflected, and are firmly fixed to the wood. Suitable for a wide range of materials Self tapping screws are designed for wood such as hardwood, plywood, particleboard, fiberboardplastic and board articles, etc. 360PCS Wood Screws 360PCS Black Screws 400PCS Wood Screws 800PCS Wood Screws 100PCS Metal Wall Plugs Drywall Screws 230PCS Screws and Wall Plugs Set Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,199 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,199 4.2 out of 5 stars 198 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,199 4.6 out of 5 stars 37 4.7 out of 5 stars 23 Price £9.69 £ 9 . 69 £9.58 £ 9 . 58 £7.58 £ 7 . 58 £13.58 £ 13 . 58 £8.59 £ 8 . 59 £8.58 £ 8 . 58 Quantity 360PCS 360PCS 400PCS 800PCS 100PCS 230PCS Material Carbon Steel Carbon Steel Galvanised Steel Carbon Steel Carbon Steel Carbon Steel
